raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to apply gentle lateral support without contacting box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is laterally stabilized by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of shifting/collision with box_2 during the grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 front side is accessible for approach; left arm is stabilizing box_1; the right end-effector can establish a firm side clamp/contact on box_1 without needing the claw (box size exceeds 10 cm claw limit).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by the right end-effector (non-claw grasp), with stability maintained and no contact-induced displacement of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector has achieved a secure hold on box_1 and can maintain control during release of external support.",
    "Postcondition": "Left-arm stabilization is removed while box_1 remains securely controlled by the right end-effector."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to apply gentle lateral support without contacting box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is laterally stabilized by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of shifting/collision with box_2 during the grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 front side is accessible for approach; left arm is stabilizing box_1; the right end-effector can establish a firm side clamp/contact on box_1 without needing the claw (box size exceeds 10 cm claw limit).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by the right end-effector (non-claw grasp), with stability maintained and no contact-induced displacement of box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector has achieved a secure hold on box_1 and can maintain control during release of external support.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Left-arm stabilization is removed while box_1 remains securely controlled by the right end-effector.
